codeReview.summary: The README implementation is comprehensive and covers the requested setup/dev/test/build/deploy/project-structure/contributing sections without exposing secrets, but it documents a non-existent root script (`npm run typecheck`) in two places.

issues.description: README instructs users to run `npm run typecheck` (also repeated at line 181), but the root `package.json` has no `typecheck` script in its `scripts` block. This makes documented verification instructions fail for contributors.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The implementation-worker skill lacks an explicit docs-only exception path for TDD/manual browser verification, causing avoidable procedure deviations on documentation-only features.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/implementation-worker/SKILL.md:28 enforces a generic "Write Tests First (TDD)" step; handoff for this feature records deviations for docs-only work and suggests updating the skill (handoff lines 52, 57, 62).

summary: Review failed due to a blocking documentation correctness issue: README references a non-existent `npm run typecheck` command. Aside from that, required README coverage and secret hygiene are good.
